headline: Dollar Tree Says Economic Anxiety Is Driving More Bargain Hunting
summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. stock rose sharply Thursday after the discount retailer reported first-quarter results that topped Wall Street expectations. Quarterly Results Beat Expectations Dollar Tree reported first-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.74 per share, exceeding analyst estimates of $1.55 per share....
